name: Phihong Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Phihong Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells power supply products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers power adaptors, power over Ethernet products, EV chargers, and worksite radios for personal electronics, networking, POS, small home appliance, medical, industrial, construction, and electric vehicle applications. It serves telecom, datacom, personal electronics, and industrial markets. The company was formerly known as Phihong Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Phihong Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2003. Phihong Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
